SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST DAVID GRASSI, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-06-2009, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-21-2009. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: JOYCE LONG, CSR#8620. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-06-2009 CONTINUED TO OCT-05-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S), OR FILE DISMISSAL. ***NOTICE OF IMPENDING DISCRETIONARY DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 583.410 AND C.C.P. §583.420 (A)(1).*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-05-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OCT-05-2009 AT 1:30PM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 583.410 AND C.C.P. §583.420 (A)(1). THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. No objection filed. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed, this dismissal is pursuant to CCP 583.410 and CCP 583.420 (a)(1). The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (212)
